metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Apurv Bazari

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Interactive wizard that analyzes your codebase and generates complete Claude tooling — including CI/CD, harness, evolution hooks, feature verification, and plugin-aware quality-gate hooks

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Cross-platform system notifications for Claude Code — macOS (terminal-notifier) and Linux (notify-send) with duration filtering

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Scaffold new projects with AI-native tooling that evolves with your code, with plugin-integration quality gates (requires onboard >= 2.2.0)
